# Planning Interview Fixture

## Context Pinning

This prompt stands in for the full rendered planning prompt. It includes project protocol, pinned context, and interaction modes that must survive compaction verbatim.

## Interview Modes

- polish / do-a-polish: report-only mode. Review the proposed wording and report suggested edits, but do not modify files or apply edits unless the human explicitly asks you to make the edits.
- one-by-one: ask exactly one design question per turn, then wait for the human's answer before asking the next question or changing topics.

## Final Protocol

End with exactly one progress marker on its own final line.
